name: Gateau Au Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 2 Vanilla beans, split and seeds scraped inside
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 250°F. Butter and flour a 12-inch springform pan. Break chocolate into chunks and place in the top of a double boiler with butter. Melt over simmering water, stirring occasionally. Stir in 1 1/4 cups sugar into the chocolate-and-butter mixture until dissolved. Beat egg yolks in a separate bowl. Gradually beat some of the hot chocolate mixture into yolks. Combine all together in the saucepan and cook over simmering water, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened. Stir in Grand Marnier and vanilla.
Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks. Continue beating, gradually adding the remaining 1/4 cup sugar until whites form stiff peaks when the beater is removed. Carefully fold egg whites into the chocolate mixture. Pour mixture into prepared pan and bake for 3 hours. Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature, covering and chilling.
While the cake cools, make creme anglaise. Bring milk to a boil in a medium saucepan. Mix egg yolks and sugar in a bowl and whisk hot milk into the mixture. Return mixture to saucepan.
